checks_to_record_before_move: Exact plan id was approved immediately before execution.
Mapper was rerun and all evidence hashes still match this template.
This execution receipt was written before moving files.
Source path exists and archive destination is absent.
checks_to_record_after_move: Archive file hashes match file_manifest_sha256 and each file_manifest entry.
No non-selected source, runtime, Android, debug-client, or /opt path was modified.

verify_after_rollback: Rollback file hashes match file_manifest_sha256 and each file_manifest entry.
Mapper rerun returns the selected plan to blocked_pending_explicit_approval.

prohibited_actions: No Android/package rebuild in the same lane.
No production or beta deploy action.
